_comment: Recovery spec — Arial / Courier New / Times New Roman sizes 9-84.5 (full style/weight matrix, both densities). The wide-d2 merge inadvertently dropped these records from the bundles (family-key drop instead of exact-key drop). The atlas .qoi/.webp files for these fonts are still on disk; we only need to regenerate the metrics + positioning bundle records. After the build, run merge-delta-bundles.js on the staging dir to fold the records back in.

fontSets.name: Recovery — Arial / Courier New / Times New Roman sizes 9-84.5
